<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Resenha FC — Camisas Tailandesas Qualidade 1.1</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Barlow:wght@400;500;600;700;900&family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --verde: #8DC63F;
    --azul: #0D2D5E;
    --preto: #080D12;
    --branco: #F5F7FA;
    --neon: #AAFF00;
    --cinza: #1A2535;
    --cinza2: #2A3A50;
  }

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif;
    background: var(--preto);
    color: var(--branco);
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  /* ===== HEADER ===== */
  header {
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 999;
    background: rgba(8,13,18,0.97);
    border-bottom: 2px solid var(--verde);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  }

  .header-top {
    background: var(--verde);
    overflow: hidden;
    padding: 8px 0;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--preto);
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  .marquee-track {
    display: inline-flex;
    animation: marquee 22s linear infinite;
  }

  .marquee-track span {
    padding: 0 32px;
    border-right: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  @keyframes marquee {
    from { transform: translateX(0); }
    to   { transform: translateX(-50%); }
  }

  nav {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 12px 40px;
    max-width: 1400px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  .logo-area {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
  }

  .logo-area img {
    height: 56px;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(141,198,63,0.5));
  }

  .logo-text {
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    font-size: 28px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    color: var(--branco);
    line-height: 1;
  }

  .logo-text span {
    color: var(--verde);
    display: block;
    font-size: 14px;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
  }

  .nav-links {
    display: flex;
    gap: 4px;
    list-style: none;
  }

  .nav-links a {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--branco);
    text-decoration: none;
    padding: 8px 16px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    position: relative;
  }

  .nav-links a:hover, .nav-links a.active {
    color: var(--neon);
    background: rgba(141,198,63,0.1);
  }

  .nav-links a.active::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    width: 20px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--neon);
  }

  .nav-actions {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
  }

  .btn-whats {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    background: #25D366;
    color: white;
    padding: 10px 20px;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 14px;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }

  .btn-whats:hover { background: #1ebe5d; transform: translateY(-1px); }

  .cart-btn {
    position: relative;
    background: var(--cinza);
    border: 1px solid var(--cinza2);
    color: var(--branco);
    padding: 10px 16px;
    border-radius: 6px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 18px;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }

  .cart-btn:hover { border-color: var(--verde); }

  .cart-count {
    position: absolute;
    top: -6px;
    right: -6px;
    background: var(--verde);
    color: var(--preto);
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 900;
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }

  /* ===== HERO ===== */
  .hero {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 90vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--preto);
  }

  .hero-bg {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 50%, rgba(13,45,94,0.8) 0%, transparent 60%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 80%, rgba(141,198,63,0.12) 0%, transparent 50%);
  }

  .hero-grid { display: none; }

  .hero-content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    max-width: 1400px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 60px 40px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 60px;
    width: 100%;
  }

  .hero-badge {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    background: rgba(141,198,63,0.15);
    border: 1px solid var(--verde);
    color: var(--neon);
    padding: 6px 16px;
    border-radius: 100px;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    animation: fadeDown 0.6s ease both;
  }

  .hero-title {
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(56px, 7vw, 96px);
    line-height: 0.95;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    animation: fadeDown 0.7s ease both;
  }

  .hero-title .green { color: var(--neon); text-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(170,255,0,0.4); }

  .hero-sub {
    font-size: 18px;
    color: rgba(245,247,250,0.7);
    margin: 20px 0 36px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    animation: fadeDown 0.8s ease both;
  }

  .hero-btns {
    display: flex;
    gap: 14px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    animation: fadeDown 0.9s ease both;
  }

  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--verde);
    color: var(--preto);
    padding: 16px 36px;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 17px;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    text-decoration: none;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .btn-primary:hover {
    background: var(--neon);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(141,198,63,0.4);
  }

  .btn-outline {
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--branco);
    padding: 16px 36px;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 17px;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    text-decoration: none;
    border: 2px solid rgba(245,247,250,0.3);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }

  .btn-outline:hover {
    border-color: var(--verde);
    color: var(--verde);
  }

  .hero-stats {
    display: flex;
    gap: 32px;
    margin-top: 40px;
    animation: fadeDown 1s ease both;
  }

  .stat { text-align: center; }

  .stat-num {
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    font-size: 36px;
    color: var(--neon);
    line-height: 1;
  }

  .stat-label {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: rgba(245,247,250,0.5);
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  /* ── HERO CAROUSEL ── */
  .hero-visual {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    animation: fadeLeft 0.8s ease both;
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
  }

  .hero-carousel-wrap {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 520px;
    height: 440px;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-radius: 20px;
  }

  .hero-carousel-track {
    display: flex;
    height: 100%;
    transition: transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
    will-change: transform;
  }

  .hero-slide {
    min-width: 260px;
    height: 100%;
    padding: 0 8px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .hero-slide-inner {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    border-radius: 16px;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: rgba(13, 45, 94, 0.55);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    border: 1px solid rgba(141, 198, 63, 0.18);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.45), 0 0 0 1px rgba(170,255,0,0.06);
    transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  .hero-slide-inner:hover {
    transform: translateY(-6px) scale(1.02);
    box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.55), 0 0 24px rgba(170,255,0,0.12);
  }

  .hero-slide-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 72%;
    object-fit: contain;
    padding: 16px;
    display: block;
  }

  .hero-slide-img-placeholder {
    width: 100%;
    height: 72%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 72px;
  }

  .hero-slide-info {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    padding: 14px 16px;
    background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(8,13,18,0.92) 80%, transparent);
  }

  .hero-slide-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    background: rgba(170,255,0,0.15);
    border: 1px solid rgba(170,255,0,0.4);
    color: var(--neon);
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 900;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 3px 9px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    animation: heroBadgePulse 2.5s ease-in-out infinite;
  }

  @keyframes heroBadgePulse {
    0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(170,255,0,0.3); }
    50% { box-shadow: 0 0 10px 3px rgba(170,255,0,0.15); }
  }

  .hero-slide-team {
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--verde);
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .hero-slide-name {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 17px;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--branco);
    line-height: 1.1;
  }

  .hero-slide-price {
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    font-size: 28px;
    color: var(--neon);
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(170,255,0,0.4);
  }

  /* dots */
  .hero-carousel-dots {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 6px;
    margin-top: 14px;
  }

  .hero-cdot {
    width: 6px;
    height: 6px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }

  .hero-cdot.active {
    background: var(--neon);
    width: 18px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(170,255,0,0.5);
  }

  /* Gradiente lateral para sensação de continuidade */
  .hero-carousel-wrap::before,
  .hero-carousel-wrap::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    width: 40px;
    z-index: 2;
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  .hero-carousel-wrap::before { left: 0; background: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(8,13,18,0.6), transparent); }
  .hero-carousel-wrap::after  { right: 0; background: linear-gradient(to left,  rgba(8,13,18,0.6), transparent); }

  /* ===== SECTION STYLES ===== */
  section { padding: 80px 32px; max-width: 1600px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .products-section { padding-top: 40px; padding-bottom: 80px; max-width: 1600px; }

  .section-header {
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 50px;
  }

  .section-tag {
    display: inline-block;
    color: var(--verde);
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }

  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(36px, 5vw, 56px);
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    line-height: 1;
  }

  .section-title span { color: var(--verde); }

  /* ===== CATEGORY TABS ===== */
  .categories-wrap {
    background: rgba(13,45,94,0.2);
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(141,198,63,0.2);
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(141,198,63,0.2);
    padding: 0;
  }

  .categories-inner {
    max-width: 1400px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 40px;
    display: flex;
    gap: 0;
    overflow-x: auto;
  }

  .cat-tab {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 20px 28px;
    color: rgba(245,247,250,0.6);
    cursor: pointer;
    border: none;
    background: none;
    border-bottom: 3px solid transparent;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    white-space: nowrap;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .cat-tab:hover, .cat-tab.active {
    color: var(--branco);
    border-bottom-color: var(--verde);
  }

  .cat-tab.active { color: var(--neon); }

  /* ===== PRODUTOS ===== */
  .products-section { padding-top: 60px; }

  .filters-bar {
    display: flex;
    gap: 12px;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .filter-label {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: rgba(245,247,250,0.5);
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .filter-btn {
    background: var(--cinza);
    border: 1px solid var(--cinza2);
    color: rgba(245,247,250,0.7);
    padding: 8px 18px;
    border-radius: 100px;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }

  .filter-btn:hover, .filter-btn.active {
    background: rgba(141,198,63,0.15);
    border-color: var(--verde);
    color: var(--neon);
  }

  .products-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr));
    gap: 24px;
  }

  .product-card {
    background: var(--cinza);
    border: 1px solid var(--cinza2);
    border-radius: 16px;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all 0.3s;
    cursor: pointer;
    position: relative;
  }

  .product-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-6px);
    border-color: rgba(141,198,63,0.5);
    box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 0 0 20px rgba(141,198,63,0.1);
  }

  .product-badge {
    position: absolute;
    top: 14px;
    left: 14px;
    background: var(--verde);
    color: var(--preto);
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 900;
    padding: 4px 10px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    z-index: 5;
  }

  .product-badge.hot { background: #FF4444; color: white; }

  .product-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 360px;
    background: #0D1825;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 80px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .product-img img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
    object-position: center;
    padding: 10px;
  }
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 64px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .product-img img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
    object-position: center;
    padding: 6px;
  }

  /* GALERIA AUTO-SLIDE NOS CARDS */
  .card-gallery {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    display: flex;
    transition: none;
  }
  .card-gallery-slide {
    min-width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    background: #0D1825;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .card-gallery-slide img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
    padding: 8px;
    pointer-events: none;
    user-select: none;
  }
  .card-gallery-dots {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 8px;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    display: flex;
    gap: 5px;
    z-index: 4;
  }
  .card-gallery-dot {
    width: 5px;
    height: 5px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.35);
    transition: background 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
  }
  .card-gallery-dot.active {
    background: var(--neon);
    transform: scale(1.4);
  }

  .product-img::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 60%, rgba(8,13,18,0.7));
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 3;
  }

  .product-info {
    padding: 16px;
  }

  .product-team {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--verde);
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }

  .product-name {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 17px;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    line-height: 1.2;
  }

  .product-sizes {
    display: flex;
    gap: 6px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .size-tag {
    background: var(--cinza2);
    color: rgba(245,247,250,0.7);
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    padding: 3px 8px;
    border-radius: 3px;
  }

  .product-footer {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
  }

  .product-price {
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    font-size: 28px;
    color: var(--neon);
    line-height: 1;
  }

  .product-price-old {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: rgba(245,247,250,0.4);
    text-decoration: line-through;
    display: block;
  }

  .add-cart-btn {
    background: var(--verde);
    color: var(--preto);
    border: none;
    width: 40px;
    height: 40px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 18px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-weight: 900;
  }

  .add-cart-btn:hover {
    background: var(--neon);
    transform: scale(1.1);
  }

  /* ===== FRETE ===== */
  .frete-section {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(13,45,94,0.5), rgba(26,37,53,0.8));
    border: 1px solid rgba(141,198,63,0.2);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 50px;
    max-width: 1400px;
    margin: 0 auto 80px;
  }

  .frete-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 60px;
    align-items: center;
  }

  .frete-title {
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    font-size: 48px;
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }

  .frete-title span { color: var(--verde); }

  .frete-sub {
    color: rgba(245,247,250,0.6);
    font-size: 16px;
    margin-bottom: 30px;
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  .frete-form {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 16px;
  }

  .form-row { display: flex; gap: 12px; }

  .form-group {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 6px;
    flex: 1;
  }

  .form-label {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(245,247,250,0.6);
  }

  .form-input {
    background: rgba(8,13,18,0.8);
    border: 1px solid var(--cinza2);
    color: var(--branco);
    padding: 14px 16px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    outline: none;
  }

  .form-input:focus { border-color: var(--verde); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(141,198,63,0.1); }

  .form-select {
    background: rgba(8,13,18,0.8);
    border: 1px solid var(--cinza2);
    color: var(--branco);
    padding: 14px 16px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif;
    outline: none;
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  .frete-result {
    background: rgba(141,198,63,0.1);
    border: 1px solid rgba(141,198,63,0.3);
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 16px;
    display: none;
  }

  .frete-result.show { display: block; }

  .frete-option {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 10px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(141,198,63,0.1);
  }

  .frete-option:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

  .frete-name { font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; }
  .frete-prazo { color: rgba(245,247,250,0.5); font-size: 13px; }
  .frete-valor { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 22px; color: var(--neon); }

  /* ===== PAGAMENTO ===== */
  .pagamento-section {
    max-width: 1400px;
    margin: 0 auto 80px;
  }

  .pagamento-cards {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 20px;
    margin-top: 40px;
  }

  .pag-card {
    background: var(--cinza);
    border: 1px solid var(--cinza2);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 28px 20px;
    text-align: center;
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }

  .pag-card:hover {
    border-color: var(--verde);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
  }

  .pag-icon {
    font-size: 40px;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    display: block;
  }

  .pag-title {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    color: var(--verde);
  }

  .pag-desc {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: rgba(245,247,250,0.6);
    line-height: 1.5;
  }

  /* ===== MODAL PRODUTO ===== */
  .modal-overlay {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.85);
    z-index: 9000;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 20px;
    backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
  }

  .modal-overlay.open { display: flex; }

  .modal {
    background: var(--cinza);
    border: 1px solid rgba(141,198,63,0.3);
    border-radius: 16px;
    max-width: 800px;
    width: 100%;
    max-height: 90vh;
    overflow-y: auto;
    animation: modalIn 0.3s ease;
  }

  @keyframes modalIn {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.95) translateY(20px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1) translateY(0); }
  }

  .modal-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 20px 24px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--cinza2);
  }

  .modal-title {
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    font-size: 24px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
  }

  .modal-close {
    background: none;
    border: none;
    color: rgba(245,247,250,0.5);
    font-size: 24px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }

  .modal-close:hover { color: var(--branco); }

  .modal-body { padding: 24px; }

  .modal-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 30px;
  }

  .modal-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 280px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--azul), var(--cinza2));
    border-radius: 10px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 80px;
  }

  .modal-info h3 {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 24px;
    font-weight: 800;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }

  .modal-team {
    color: var(--verde);
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .modal-price {
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    font-size: 44px;
    color: var(--neon);
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .size-selector {
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .size-selector-label {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(245,247,250,0.6);
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }

  .size-options {
    display: flex;
    gap: 8px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .size-opt {
    background: var(--cinza2);
    border: 2px solid transparent;
    color: var(--branco);
    padding: 8px 14px;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 14px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }

  .size-opt:hover, .size-opt.selected {
    border-color: var(--verde);
    color: var(--neon);
    background: rgba(141,198,63,0.1);
  }

  .personalization-check {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    background: rgba(141,198,63,0.08);
    border: 1px solid rgba(141,198,63,0.2);
    padding: 14px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  .personalization-check input { width: 18px; height: 18px; accent-color: var(--verde); cursor: pointer; }

  .pers-label { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; }
  .pers-price { font-size: 12px; color: var(--verde); margin-top: 2px; }

  .qty-selector {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .qty-btn {
    background: var(--cinza2);
    border: none;
    color: var(--branco);
    width: 36px;
    height: 36px;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-size: 18px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }

  .qty-btn:hover { background: var(--verde); color: var(--preto); }

  .qty-num {
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    font-size: 24px;
    min-width: 30px;
    text-align: center;
  }

  /* ===== CHECKOUT ===== */
  .checkout-section {
    max-width: 900px;
    margin: 0 auto 80px;
    padding: 0 40px;
  }

  .checkout-steps {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0;
    margin-bottom: 40px;
  }

  .step {
    flex: 1;
    text-align: center;
    position: relative;
  }

  .step::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 18px;
    right: -50%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--cinza2);
    z-index: 0;
  }

  .step:last-child::after { display: none; }

  .step-num {
    width: 36px;
    height: 36px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--cinza2);
    border: 2px solid var(--cinza2);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-weight: 900;
    font-size: 14px;
    margin: 0 auto 8px;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  .step.active .step-num {
    background: var(--verde);
    border-color: var(--verde);
    color: var(--preto);
  }

  .step-label { font-size: 12px; color: rgba(245,247,250,0.5); letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .step.active .step-label { color: var(--verde); }

  /* ===== LOCALIZAÇÃO ===== */
  .location-banner {
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(13,45,94,0.8), rgba(141,198,63,0.15));
    border: 1px solid rgba(141,198,63,0.2);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 24px 32px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 20px;
    max-width: 1400px;
    margin: 0 auto 40px;
  }

  .location-icon { font-size: 36px; }

  .location-info h4 {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    color: var(--verde);
  }

  .location-info p { font-size: 14px; color: rgba(245,247,250,0.7); }

  /* ===== FOOTER ===== */
  footer {
    background: rgba(13,45,94,0.3);
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(141,198,63,0.2);
    padding: 60px 40px 30px;
  }

  .footer-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 50px;
    max-width: 1400px;
    margin: 0 auto 40px;
  }

  .footer-logo img { height: 60px; margin-bottom: 16px; }

  .footer-desc {
    color: rgba(245,247,250,0.5);
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 1.7;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .social-links { display: flex; gap: 10px; }

  .social-btn {
    width: 38px;
    height: 38px;
    background: var(--cinza2);
    border-radius: 8px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--branco);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 16px;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }

  .social-btn:hover { background: var(--verde); color: var(--preto); }

  .footer-col h5 {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--verde);
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .footer-col ul { list-style: none; }

  .footer-col li {
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }

  .footer-col a {
    color: rgba(245,247,250,0.5);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 14px;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }

  .footer-col a:hover { color: var(--verde); }

  .footer-bottom {
    border-top: 1px solid var(--cinza2);
    padding-top: 24px;
    text-align: center;
    color: rgba(245,247,250,0.3);
    font-size: 13px;
    max-width: 1400px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  /* ===== WHATSAPP FLOAT ===== */
  .whats-float {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 28px;
    right: 28px;
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    background: #25D366;
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 28px;
    text-decoration: none;
    z-index: 9998;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(37,211,102,0.4);
    transition: all 0.3s;
    animation: pulse 2s infinite;
  }

  .whats-float:hover {
    transform: scale(1.1);
    box-shadow: 0 6px 30px rgba(37,211,102,0.6);
  }

  /* ===== QUALIDADE BADGE ===== */
  .quality-strip {
    background: var(--verde);
    color: var(--preto);
    padding: 14px 40px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 60px;
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .quality-strip span { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }

  /* ===== ANIMATIONS ===== */
  @keyframes fadeDown {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-20px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  @keyframes fadeLeft {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(30px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }
  }

  @keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(37,211,102,0.4); }
    50% { box-shadow: 0 4px 35px rgba(37,211,102,0.7); }
  }

  /* ===== CART SIDEBAR ===== */
  .cart-sidebar {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    right: -420px;
    width: 420px;
    height: 100vh;
    background: #0F1922;
    border-left: 1px solid rgba(141,198,63,0.2);
    z-index: 9997;
    transition: right 0.3s ease;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .cart-sidebar.open { right: 0; }

  .cart-header {
    padding: 20px 24px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--cinza2);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
  }

  .cart-header h3 {
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    font-size: 24px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
  }

  .cart-items { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 16px 24px; }

  .cart-item {
    display: flex;
    gap: 14px;
    padding: 16px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--cinza2);
  }

  .cart-item-img {
    width: 70px;
    height: 70px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--azul), var(--cinza2));
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 28px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .cart-item-info { flex: 1; }

  .cart-item-name {
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }

  .cart-item-detail {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: rgba(245,247,250,0.5);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }

  .cart-item-price {
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    font-size: 20px;
    color: var(--neon);
  }

  .cart-footer {
    padding: 20px 24px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--cinza2);
    background: var(--cinza);
  }

  .cart-total {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .cart-total-label { font-size: 14px; color: rgba(245,247,250,0.6); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; }

  .cart-total-value {
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    font-size: 32px;
    color: var(--neon);
  }

  /* Responsive basic */
  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    nav { padding: 12px 16px; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .hero-content { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .hero-visual { display: none; }
    .frete-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .pagamento-cards { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .modal-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    section { padding: 50px 16px; }
    .quality-strip { gap: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap; font-size: 12px; }
    /* Mobile: 2 colunas com imagem grande */
    .products-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 12px; }
    .product-img { height: 200px; }
    .product-info { padding: 10px 12px; }
    .product-name { font-size: 13px; }
    .product-price { font-size: 20px; }
    .add-cart-btn { width: 30px; height: 30px; font-size: 18px; }
  }

  @media (min-width: 769px) and (max-width: 1100px) {
    /* Tablet: 2 colunas, imagem média */
    .products-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 20px; }
    .product-img { height: 300px; }
  }

  @media (min-width: 1101px) and (max-width: 1400px) {
    /* Desktop médio: 3 colunas */
    .products-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); }
    .product-img { height: 340px; }
  }

  @media (min-width: 1401px) {
    /* Desktop grande: 4 colunas */
    .products-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); }
    .product-img { height: 360px; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- HEADER TOP BAR -->
<div class="header-top">
  <div class="marquee-track">
    <span>🏆 QUALIDADE TAILANDESA 1.1</span>
    <span>🚚 ENTREGA PARA TODO O BRASIL</span>
    <span>📍 RETIRADA EM INDAIAL/SC</span>
    <span>✅ TODOS OS TIMES DO MUNDO</span>
    <span>⚡ PIX · CARTÃO · BOLETO</span>
    <span>👕 P AO G4 + PERSONALIZAÇÃO</span>
    <span>🏆 QUALIDADE TAILANDESA 1.1</span>
    <span>🚚 ENTREGA PARA TODO O BRASIL</span>
    <span>📍 RETIRADA EM INDAIAL/SC</span>
    <span>✅ TODOS OS TIMES DO MUNDO</span>
    <span>⚡ PIX · CARTÃO · BOLETO</span>
    <span>👕 P AO G4 + PERSONALIZAÇÃO</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- NAVIGATION -->
<header>
  <nav>
    <div class="logo-area">      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Resenha FC" onerror="this.style.display='none'">
    </div>
    <ul class="nav-links">
      <li><a href="#" class="active" onclick="showSection('home')">Início</a></li>
      <li><a href="#" onclick="showSection('produtos')">Produtos</a></li>
      <li><a href="#" onclick="showSection('frete')">Calcular Frete</a></li>
      <li><a href="#" onclick="showSection('pagamento')">Pagamento</a></li>
      <li><a href="#" onclick="showSection('contato')">Contato</a></li>
    </ul>
    <div class="nav-actions">
      <a href="https://instagram.com/resenhafc047" target="_blank" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#F58529,#DD2A7B,#8134AF);color:white;padding:10px 16px;border-radius:6px;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;text-decoration:none;transition:all 0.2s;"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="display:block">
  <defs><linearGradient id="ig" x1="0" y1="24" x2="24" y2="0" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
    <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#F58529"/><stop offset="30%" stop-color="#DD2A7B"/><stop offset="60%" stop-color="#8134AF"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#515BD4"/>
  </linearGradient></defs>
  <rect x="2" y="2" width="20" height="20" rx="6" stroke="url(#ig)" stroke-width="2"/>
  <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4" stroke="url(#ig)" stroke-width="2"/>
  <circle cx="18" cy="6" r="1.2" fill="url(#ig)"/>
</svg> @resenhafc047</a>
      <a href="https://wa.me/5547988818209" target="_blank" class="btn-whats">
        💬 WhatsApp
      </a>
      <button class="cart-btn" onclick="toggleCart()">
        🛒
        <span class="cart-count" id="cartCount">0</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </nav>
</header>

<!-- HERO -->
<div id="section-home">
  <div class="hero">
    <div class="hero-bg"></div>
    <div class="hero-grid"></div>
    <div class="hero-content">
      <div>
        <div class="hero-badge">⚽ Qualidade Tailandesa 1.1</div>
        <h1 class="hero-title">
          A CAMISA<br>
          <span class="green">DO SEU TIME</span><br>
          DO JEITO CERTO
        </h1>
        <p class="hero-sub">
          As melhores réplicas tailandesas do mercado. Fidelidade máxima ao original, tecido premium, acabamento impecável. Todos os times do mundo.
        </p>
        <div class="hero-btns">
          <a href="#" class="btn-primary" onclick="showSection('produtos')">🏪 Ver Camisas</a>
          <a href="https://wa.me/5547988818209" target="_blank" class="btn-outline">💬 Falar Agora</a>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-stats">
          <div class="stat">
            <div class="stat-num">500+</div>
            <div class="stat-label">Vendidas</div>
          </div>
          <div class="stat">
            <div class="stat-num">1.1</div>
            <div class="stat-label">Qualidade</div>
          </div>
          <div class="stat">
            <div class="stat-num">100%</div>
            <div class="stat-label">Entrega</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-visual">
        <div>
          <div class="hero-carousel-wrap" id="heroCarouselWrap">
            <div class="hero-carousel-track" id="heroCarouselTrack">
              <!-- Slides gerados dinamicamente por JS -->
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="hero-carousel-dots" id="heroCarouselDots"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- QUALITY STRIP -->
  <div class="quality-strip">
    <span>✅ Tecido Premium</span>
    <span>✅ Patch Bordado</span>
    <span>✅ Fiel ao Original</span>
    <span>✅ Todos os Tamanhos P ao G4</span>
    <span>✅ Personalização Disponível</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CATEGORIES -->
<div class="categories-wrap">
  <div class="categories-inner">
    <button class="cat-tab active" onclick="switchCat(this,'camisas')">👕 Camisas</button>
    <button class="cat-tab" onclick="switchCat(this,'shorts')">🩳 Shorts</button>
    <button class="cat-tab" onclick="switchCat(this,'acessorios')">🧢 Acessórios</button>
    <button class="cat-tab" onclick="switchCat(this,'conjuntos')">👶 Kit Infantil</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- LOCATION BANNER -->
<div style="padding: 30px 40px 0; max-width:1400px; margin:0 auto;">
  <div class="location-banner">
    <span class="location-icon">📍</span>
    <div class="location-info">
      <h4>Retirada Disponível em Indaial/SC</h4>
      <p><a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Rua+Beco+Paula+Cipriano+53+Estrada+das+Areias+Indaial+SC" target="_blank" style="color:var(--verde);text-decoration:underline;">Rua Beco Paula Cipriano, 53 — Estrada das Areias, Indaial/SC</a>. Entregamos em Timbó, Blumenau e Gaspar. Envio pelos Correios para todo o Brasil.</p>
    </div>
    <a href="#" onclick="showSection('frete')" class="btn-primary" style="margin-left:auto; white-space:nowrap">📦 Calcular Frete</a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PRODUCTS SECTION -->
<section id="section-produtos" class="products-section">
  <div class="section-header">
    <div class="section-tag">⚽ Nosso Catálogo</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">CAMISAS <span>TAILANDESAS</span></h2>
    <p style="color:rgba(245,247,250,0.6); margin-top:10px">Qualidade 1.1 — A mais fiel ao original do mercado</p>
  </div>

  <div class="filters-bar" style="justify-content:flex-start;">
    <div style="position:relative; width:100%; max-width:420px;">
      <span style="position:absolute;left:14px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);font-size:16px;pointer-events:none;">🔍</span>
      <input
        type="text"
        id="searchInput"
        placeholder="Buscar time, camisa, short..."
        oninput="filtrarProdutos(this.value)"
        style="width:100%;background:rgba(8,13,18,0.7);border:1.5px solid var(--cinza2);color:var(--branco);padding:11px 16px 11px 42px;border-radius:10px;font-size:15px;font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif;outline:none;transition:border-color 0.2s;"
        onfocus="this.style.borderColor='var(--verde)'"
        onblur="this.style.borderColor='var(--cinza2)'"
      >
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="products-grid" id="productsGrid">
    <!-- Produtos carregados dinamicamente pelo JS -->
  </div>

  <div style="text-align:center; margin-top:40px">
    <button class="btn-outline" id="loadMoreBtn" style="padding:14px 40px; display:none" onclick="loadMore()">Ver Mais Produtos ↓</button>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FRETE SECTION -->
<div style="padding: 0 40px;" id="section-frete">
  <div class="frete-section">
    <div class="frete-grid">
      <div>
        <div class="section-tag">📦 Entrega Rápida</div>
        <h2 class="frete-title">CALCULE<br>SEU <span>FRETE</span></h2>
        <p class="frete-sub">Entregamos para todo o Brasil via Correios (PAC e SEDEX). Retirada gratuita em Indaial/SC — Rua Beco Paula Cipriano, 53, Estrada das Areias. Entrega própria em Timbó, Blumenau e região.</p>
        <div style="display:flex; gap:16px; flex-wrap:wrap">
          <div style="background:rgba(141,198,63,0.1); border:1px solid rgba(141,198,63,0.3); border-radius:8px; padding:14px 20px; text-align:center">
            <div style="font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif; font-size:22px; color:var(--neon)">GRÁTIS</div>
            <div style="font-size:12px; color:rgba(245,247,250,0.5)">Retirada em Indaial</div>
          </div>
          <div style="background:rgba(141,198,63,0.1); border:1px solid rgba(141,198,63,0.3); border-radius:8px; padding:14px 20px; text-align:center">
            <div style="font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif; font-size:22px; color:var(--neon)">SEDEX</div>
            <div style="font-size:12px; color:rgba(245,247,250,0.5)">Todo o Brasil</div>
          </div>
          <div style="background:rgba(141,198,63,0.1); border:1px solid rgba(141,198,63,0.3); border-radius:8px; padding:14px 20px; text-align:center">
            <div style="font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif; font-size:22px; color:var(--neon)">PAC</div>
            <div style="font-size:12px; color:rgba(245,247,250,0.5)">Mais econômico</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="frete-form">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">📮 Seu CEP</label>
            <div style="display:flex; gap:10px">
              <input class="form-input" type="text" id="cepInput" placeholder="00000-000" maxlength="9" style="flex:1" oninput="formatCEP(this)">
              <button class="btn-primary" style="white-space:nowrap; padding:14px 24px" onclick="calcularFrete()">Calcular</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div id="freteResult" class="frete-result">
            <div style="font-size:13px; color:var(--verde); font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1px; margin-bottom:12px">OPÇÕES DE ENTREGA</div>
            <div class="frete-option">
              <div>
                <div class="frete-name">📦 PAC</div>
                <div class="frete-prazo">Prazo: 8 a 15 dias úteis</div>
              </div>
              <div class="frete-valor" id="pacValor">R$ --</div>
            </div>
            <div class="frete-option">
              <div>
                <div class="frete-name">⚡ SEDEX</div>
                <div class="frete-prazo">Prazo: 2 a 5 dias úteis</div>
              </div>
              <div class="frete-valor" id="sedexValor">R$ --</div>
            </div>
            <div class="frete-option">
              <div>
                <div class="frete-name">🏪 Retirada em Indaial/SC</div>
                <div class="frete-prazo">Combinar horário via WhatsApp</div>
              </div>
              <div class="frete-valor" style="color:var(--verde)">GRÁTIS</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">📍 Localidade</label>
            <input class="form-input" type="text" id="localidade" placeholder="Cidade/Estado" readonly>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PAGAMENTO SECTION -->
<div style="padding: 0 40px 80px;" id="section-pagamento">
  <div class="pagamento-section" style="max-width:100%">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-tag">💳 Formas de Pagamento</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">PAGUE DO <span>JEITO QUE QUISER</span></h2>
    </div>
    <div class="pagamento-cards">
      <div class="pag-card">
        <span class="pag-icon">⚡</span>
        <div class="pag-title">PIX</div>
        <div class="pag-desc">Pagamento instantâneo. Aprovação imediata e sem taxas adicionais.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="pag-card">
        <span class="pag-icon">💳</span>
        <div class="pag-title">Cartão Parcelado</div>
        <div class="pag-desc">Parcele em até 12x. Juros por conta do comprador. Visa, Mastercard e mais.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="pag-card">
        <span class="pag-icon">📄</span>
        <div class="pag-title">Boleto</div>
        <div class="pag-desc">Pague com boleto bancário. Prazo de até 3 dias úteis para compensação.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="pag-card">
        <span class="pag-icon">🤝</span>
        <div class="pag-title">Na Entrega / Retirada</div>
        <div class="pag-desc">Pague em dinheiro, Pix ou cartão na hora da retirada ou entrega na região.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CONTATO SECTION -->
<div style="padding: 0 40px 80px; max-width:1400px; margin:0 auto;" id="section-contato">
  <div style="background:var(--cinza); border:1px solid var(--cinza2); border-radius:16px; padding:50px">
    <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:60px">
      <div>
        <div class="section-tag">📬 Fale Conosco</div>
        <h2 class="section-title" style="margin-bottom:16px">ENTRE EM <span>CONTATO</span></h2>
        <p style="color:rgba(245,247,250,0.6); margin-bottom:30px; line-height:1.7">Dúvidas sobre tamanhos, disponibilidade, personalização ou prazo? A gente te atende rápido!</p>
        <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:16px">
          <a href="https://wa.me/5547988818209" target="_blank" style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:14px; background:rgba(37,211,102,0.1); border:1px solid rgba(37,211,102,0.3); border-radius:10px; padding:16px; text-decoration:none; transition:all 0.2s" onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='#25D366'" onmouseout="this.style.borderColor='rgba(37,211,102,0.3)'">
            <span style="font-size:28px">💬</span>
            <div>
              <div style="font-weight:700; color:#25D366; font-size:15px">WhatsApp</div>
              <div style="color:rgba(245,247,250,0.7); font-size:14px">(47) 9 8881-8209 — Resposta rápida!</div>
            </div>
          </a>
          <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:14px; background:rgba(141,198,63,0.08); border:1px solid rgba(141,198,63,0.2); border-radius:10px; padding:16px">
            <span style="font-size:28px">📍</span>
            <div>
              <div style="font-weight:700; color:var(--verde); font-size:15px">Localização</div>
              <div style="color:rgba(245,247,250,0.7); font-size:14px">Rua Beco Paula Cipriano, 53<br>Estrada das Areias — Indaial/SC<br>Retirada: combinar via WhatsApp</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h3 style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif; font-size:20px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:20px; color:var(--verde)">Formulário de Pedido</h3>
        <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:14px">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Nome Completo</label>
            <input class="form-input" type="text" placeholder="Seu nome">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">WhatsApp</label>
            <input class="form-input" type="tel" placeholder="(47) 9 9999-9999">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Produto de Interesse</label>
            <input class="form-input" type="text" placeholder="Ex: Camisa Flamengo I, tamanho G">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">CEP / Endereço de Entrega</label>
            <input class="form-input" type="text" placeholder="CEP ou endereço completo">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Mensagem / Dúvida</label>
            <textarea class="form-input" rows="3" placeholder="Personalização, tamanho, disponibilidade..."></textarea>
          </div>
          <button class="btn-primary" style="width:100%; justify-content:center" onclick="enviarFormulario()">
            📩 Enviar Pedido
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-grid">
    <div class="footer-logo">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Resenha FC" onerror="this.style.display='none'">
      <p class="footer-desc">A melhor loja de camisas tailandesas do sul do Brasil. Qualidade 1.1, todos os times, entrega para todo o país.</p>
      <div class="social-links">
        <a href="https://instagram.com/resenhafc047" target="_blank" class="social-btn" title="@resenhafc047" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#F58529,#DD2A7B,#8134AF)"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="display:block">
  <defs><linearGradient id="ig" x1="0" y1="24" x2="24" y2="0" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
    <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#F58529"/><stop offset="30%" stop-color="#DD2A7B"/><stop offset="60%" stop-color="#8134AF"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#515BD4"/>
  </linearGradient></defs>
  <rect x="2" y="2" width="20" height="20" rx="6" stroke="url(#ig)" stroke-width="2"/>
  <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4" stroke="url(#ig)" stroke-width="2"/>
  <circle cx="18" cy="6" r="1.2" fill="url(#ig)"/>
</svg></a>
        <a href="https://wa.me/5547988818209" target="_blank" class="social-btn" style="background:#25D366;">💬</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-col">
      <h5>Categorias</h5>
      <ul>
        <li><a href="#">👕 Camisas</a></li>
        <li><a href="#">🩳 Shorts</a></li>
        <li><a href="#">🧢 Acessórios</a></li>
        <li><a href="#">👶 Kit Infantil</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-col">
      <h5>Informações</h5>
      <ul>
        <li><a href="#">📦 Calcular Frete</a></li>
        <li><a href="#" onclick="document.getElementById('tamanhoModal').classList.add('open'); return false;">📏 Guia de Tamanhos</a></li>
        <li><a href="#" onclick="document.getElementById('trocasModal').classList.add('open'); return false;">🔄 Trocas e Devoluções</a></li>
        <li><a href="#" onclick="document.getElementById('faqModal').classList.add('open'); return false;">❓ Perguntas Frequentes</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-col">
      <h5>Contato</h5>
      <ul>
        <li><a href="https://wa.me/5547988818209">💬 WhatsApp</a></li>
        <li><a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Rua+Beco+Paula+Cipriano+53+Estrada+das+Areias+Indaial+SC" target="_blank">📍 Indaial / SC</a></li>
        <li><a href="https://instagram.com/resenhafc047" target="_blank">📸 @resenhafc047</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="footer-bottom">
    © 2025 Resenha FC — Camisas Tailandesas Qualidade 1.1 | Indaial, Santa Catarina
  </div>
</footer>

<!-- WHATSAPP FLOAT -->
<a href="https://wa.me/5547988818209" target="_blank" class="whats-float">💬</a>

<!-- TROCAS E DEVOLUÇÕES MODAL -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="trocasModal" onclick="if(event.target===this)this.classList.remove('open')" style="align-items:flex-start; padding:40px 20px; overflow-y:auto;">
  <div class="modal" style="max-width:760px; width:100%;">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <div class="modal-title">🔄 POLÍTICA DE TROCAS E DEVOLUÇÕES</div>
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="document.getElementById('trocasModal').classList.remove('open')">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body" style="padding:30px 32px;">

      <div style="background:rgba(141,198,63,0.08); border-left:4px solid var(--verde); border-radius:0 8px 8px 0; padding:14px 18px; margin-bottom:28px; font-size:14px; color:rgba(245,247,250,0.8); line-height:1.6;">
        Elaborada em conformidade com o <strong style="color:var(--verde)">Código de Defesa do Consumidor (Lei nº 8.078/90)</strong> e o Decreto nº 7.962/2013. Ao efetuar uma compra, o cliente declara ciência e concordância com estes termos.
      </div>

      <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:24px;">

        <div style="background:var(--cinza2); border-radius:10px; padding:22px;">
          <div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif; font-size:17px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--verde); margin-bottom:12px;">⏱️ Direito de Arrependimento — Compras Online</div>
          <p style="font-size:14px; color:rgba(245,247,250,0.8); line-height:1.7; margin-bottom:10px;">Nos termos do <strong>art. 49 do CDC</strong>, você pode exercer o direito de arrependimento em até <strong style="color:var(--neon)">7 dias corridos</strong> após o recebimento do produto.</p>
          <div style="font-size:13px; color:rgba(245,247,250,0.6); line-height:1.8;">
            ✅ Produto sem indícios de uso indevido<br>
            ✅ Em condições adequadas de devolução<br>
            ✅ Preferencialmente na embalagem original<br>
            ✅ Reembolso integral, incluindo frete, pelo mesmo meio de pagamento
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style="background:var(--cinza2); border-radius:10px; padding:22px;">
          <div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif; font-size:17px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--verde); margin-bottom:12px;">⚠️ Produtos com Defeito ou Vício</div>
          <p style="font-size:14px; color:rgba(245,247,250,0.8); line-height:1.7; margin-bottom:10px;">Prazo legal de até <strong style="color:var(--neon)">30 dias</strong> para solução. Não resolvido nesse período, o cliente pode optar por:</p>
          <div style="font-size:13px; color:rgba(245,247,250,0.6); line-height:1.8;">
            🔁 Substituição do produto<br>
            💰 Restituição integral dos valores pagos<br>
            📉 Abatimento proporcional do preço
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style="background:var(--cinza2); border-radius:10px; padding:22px;">
          <div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif; font-size:17px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--verde); margin-bottom:12px;">🔀 Trocas por Preferência (tamanho, cor, modelo)</div>
          <p style="font-size:14px; color:rgba(245,247,250,0.8); line-height:1.7;">Trocas por preferência fora do prazo legal são uma <strong>liberalidade</strong> da empresa, condicionadas a disponibilidade de estoque, produto em perfeitas condições e possível cobrança de custos logísticos.</p>
        </div>

        <div style="background:rgba(255,180,0,0.06); border:1px solid rgba(255,180,0,0.25); border-radius:10px; padding:22px;">
          <div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif; font-size:17px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; color:#FFB400; margin-bottom:12px;">✏️ Produtos Personalizados e Sob Encomenda</div>
          <p style="font-size:14px; color:rgba(245,247,250,0.8); line-height:1.7; margin-bottom:10px;">Por sua natureza exclusiva, <strong>não se aplica o direito de arrependimento</strong>, salvo em caso de defeito de fabricação ou divergência comprovada em relação ao pedido aprovado.</p>
          <div style="font-size:13px; color:rgba(245,247,250,0.6); line-height:1.8;">
            ⚡ Produção iniciada somente após aprovação expressa<br>
            ⚡ Sinal/entrada pago não é reembolsável após início da produção
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style="background:var(--cinza2); border-radius:10px; padding:22px;">
          <div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif; font-size:17px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--verde); margin-bottom:12px;">📦 Custos de Frete</div>
          <div style="font-size:13px; color:rgba(245,247,250,0.7); line-height:2;">
            <span style="color:var(--neon)">Arrependimento legal →</span> frete por conta da empresa<br>
            <span style="color:var(--neon)">Troca por preferência →</span> frete pode ser atribuído ao cliente<br>
            <span style="color:var(--neon)">Defeito comprovado →</span> todos os custos por conta da empresa
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style="background:var(--cinza2); border-radius:10px; padding:22px;">
          <div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif; font-size:17px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--verde); margin-bottom:12px;">📋 Como Solicitar</div>
          <p style="font-size:14px; color:rgba(245,247,250,0.8); line-height:1.7; margin-bottom:12px;">Entre em contato pelos canais oficiais informando:</p>
          <div style="font-size:13px; color:rgba(245,247,250,0.6); line-height:1.8;">
            📌 Número do pedido<br>
            📌 Descrição detalhada da solicitação<br>
            📌 Fotos do produto (quando aplicável)
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

      <div style="text-align:center; margin-top:28px;">
        <a href="https://wa.me/5547988818209" target="_blank" class="btn-primary" style="display:inline-flex;">
          💬 Falar com Atendimento
        </a>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PRODUCT MODAL -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="modalOverlay" onclick="closeModal(event)">
  <div class="modal" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <div class="modal-title" id="modalTitle">CAMISA</div>
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="document.getElementById('modalOverlay').classList.remove('open')">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div class="modal-grid">
        <div>
          <div id="modalImgSlider" style="position:relative;width:100%;height:380px;border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;background:#0D1825;">
          <div id="modalImgTrack" style="display:flex;width:100%;height:100%;transition:transform 0.35s ease;"></div>
          <button id="sliderPrev" onclick="event.stopPropagation();sliderNav(-1)" style="display:none;position:absolute;left:8px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);border:none;color:white;width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;font-size:18px;cursor:pointer;z-index:5;">‹</button>
          <button id="sliderNext" onclick="event.stopPropagation();sliderNav(1)" style="display:none;position:absolute;right:8px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);border:none;color:white;width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;font-size:18px;cursor:pointer;z-index:5;">›</button>
          <div id="sliderDots" style="position:absolute;bottom:46px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);display:flex;gap:6px;z-index:5;"></div>
          <!-- Botão AMPLIAR explícito -->
          <button onclick="abrirLightbox()" id="btnAmpliacao" style="display:none;position:absolute;bottom:10px;right:12px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.65);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);color:white;padding:6px 12px;border-radius:20px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;z-index:10;backdrop-filter:blur(6px);letter-spacing:0.5px;gap:5px;align-items:center;transition:all 0.2s;">
            🔍 Ampliar
          </button>
        </div>
          <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:10px; margin-top:14px">
            <div style="background:var(--cinza2); border-radius:8px; padding:12px; text-align:center">
              <div style="font-size:11px; color:rgba(245,247,250,0.5); letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase">Qualidade</div>
              <div style="font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif; font-size:20px; color:var(--neon)">Tailandesa 1.1</div>
            </div>
            <div style="background:var(--cinza2); border-radius:8px; padding:12px; text-align:center">
              <div style="font-size:11px; color:rgba(245,247,250,0.5); letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase">Patch</div>
              <div style="font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif; font-size:20px; color:var(--neon)">Bordado</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="modal-info">
          <div class="modal-team" id="modalTeam">TIME</div>
          <h3 id="modalName">Camisa</h3>
          <div class="modal-price" id="modalPrice">R$ 149,90</div>

          <div class="size-selector">
            <div class="size-selector-label">Tamanho</div>
            <div class="size-options">
              <button class="size-opt" onclick="selectSize(this)">P</button>
              <button class="size-opt" onclick="selectSize(this)">M</button>
              <button class="size-opt" onclick="selectSize(this)">G</button>
              <button class="size-opt" onclick="selectSize(this)">GG</button>
              <button class="size-opt" onclick="selectSize(this)">G1</button>
              <button class="size-opt" onclick="selectSize(this)">G2</button>
              <button class="size-opt" onclick="selectSize(this)">G3</button>
              <button class="size-opt" onclick="selectSize(this)">G4</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div id="sizeExtraNote" style="display:none; font-size:12px; color:#FFB400; margin-top:6px;">⚠️ Tamanho especial: + R$ 10,00</div>

          <div style="background:rgba(141,198,63,0.08); border:1px solid rgba(141,198,63,0.2); border-radius:10px; padding:14px; margin-bottom:16px;">
            <label style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; cursor:pointer; margin-bottom:0;" onclick="togglePers()">
              <input type="checkbox" id="persCheck" onchange="updateModalPrice()" style="width:18px;height:18px;accent-color:var(--verde);cursor:pointer;">
              <div>
                <div class="pers-label">✏️ Quero personalizar minha camisa</div>
                <div class="pers-price">+ R$ 40,00</div>
              </div>
            </label>
            <div id="persFields" style="display:none; margin-top:14px; display:none; flex-direction:column; gap:10px;">
              <div>
                <label style="font-size:12px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(245,247,250,0.5); display:block; margin-bottom:5px;">Nome na camisa</label>
                <input id="persNome" type="text" maxlength="20" placeholder="Ex: SILVA" class="form-input" style="width:100%; font-size:14px; padding:10px 12px; text-transform:uppercase;">
              </div>
              <div>
                <label style="font-size:12px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(245,247,250,0.5); display:block; margin-bottom:5px;">Número</label>
                <input id="persNumero" type="number" min="1" max="99" placeholder="Ex: 10" class="form-input" style="width:100%; font-size:14px; padding:10px 12px;">
              </div>
              <div style="font-size:12px; color:rgba(245,247,250,0.4); line-height:1.5;">
                ⚠️ Confira atentamente — personalização não é trocável
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="qty-selector">
            <span style="font-size:13px; color:rgba(245,247,250,0.5); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1px">Qtd:</span>
            <button class="qty-btn" onclick="changeQty(-1)">−</button>
            <span class="qty-num" id="qtyNum">1</span>
            <button class="qty-btn" onclick="changeQty(1)">+</button>
          </div>

          <div style="display:flex; gap:10px">
            <button class="btn-primary" style="flex:1; justify-content:center" onclick="addToCartModal()">
              🛒 Adicionar ao Carrinho
            </button>
          </div>
          <a href="https://wa.me/5547988818209" target="_blank" style="display:block; text-align:center; margin-top:10px; color:var(--verde); font-size:13px; font-weight:700; text-decoration:none">
            💬 Dúvidas? Fale pelo WhatsApp
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CART SIDEBAR -->
<div class="cart-sidebar" id="cartSidebar">
  <div class="cart-header">
    <h3>🛒 MEU CARRINHO</h3>
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="toggleCart()">✕</button>
  </div>
  <div class="cart-items" id="cartItems">
    <div style="text-align:center; color:rgba(245,247,250,0.4); padding:40px 0">
      <div style="font-size:48px; margin-bottom:12px">🛒</div>
      <div>Seu carrinho está vazio</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="cart-footer">
    <div style="margin-bottom:14px">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">📮 Calcular Frete</label>
        <div style="display:flex; gap:8px">
          <input class="form-input" type="text" placeholder="Seu CEP" style="font-size:14px">
          <button class="btn-primary" style="padding:12px 16px; font-size:13px">OK</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="cart-total">
      <span class="cart-total-label">Total</span>
      <span class="cart-total-value" id="cartTotal">R$ 0,00</span>
    </div>
    <button class="btn-primary" style="width:100%; justify-content:center; font-size:16px" onclick="toggleCart(); abrirCheckout()">
      ✅ Finalizar Pedido
    </button>
    <a href="https://wa.me/5547988818209" target="_blank" style="display:block; text-align:center; margin-top:10px; color:rgba(245,247,250,0.35); font-size:12px; font-weight:600; text-decoration:none">
      💬 Dúvidas? Fale pelo WhatsApp
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  // Cart state
  let cart = [];
  let currentQty = 1;
  let currentProduct = {};

  // Navigation
  function showSection(section) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.nav-links a').forEach(a => a.classList.remove('active'));
    const el = document.getElementById('section-' + section);
    if (el) el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
  }

  // Category tabs
  function switchCat(btn, cat) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.cat-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
    btn.classList.add('active');
    // In a real app, filter products by category
  }

  // Busca por texto (substitui os filtros)
  function filtrarProdutos(termo) {
    renderProdutos(null, termo.trim().toLowerCase());
  }

  // Product Modal
  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════
  // SLIDER DE IMAGENS NO MODAL
  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════
  let sliderIndex = 0;
  let sliderTotal = 0;

  function buildSlider(product) {
    const track = document.getElementById('modalImgTrack');
    const dots  = document.getElementById('sliderDots');
    const prev  = document.getElementById('sliderPrev');
    const next  = document.getElementById('sliderNext');
    sliderIndex = 0;

    // Monta lista de fotos
    let fotos = [];
    if (product.fotos && product.fotos.length > 0) {
      fotos = product.fotos.filter(f => f && f.trim());
    } else if (product.imgUrl && product.imgUrl.trim()) {
      fotos = [product.imgUrl];
    }

    sliderTotal = fotos.length;
    const btnAmp = document.getElementById('btnAmpliacao');

    if (sliderTotal === 0) {
      track.innerHTML = `<div style="min-width:100%;height:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:80px;">${product.emoji || '👕'}</div>`;
      dots.innerHTML = '';
      prev.style.display = 'none';
      next.style.display = 'none';
      if (btnAmp) btnAmp.style.display = 'none';
      track.style.transform = 'translateX(0)';
      return;
    }

    // Tem fotos — mostra botão Ampliar
    if (btnAmp) btnAmp.style.display = 'flex';

    track.innerHTML = fotos.map((f, fi) => {
      const emojiEscaped = (product.emoji || '👕').replace(/'/g, '');
      return `<div style="min-width:100%;height:100%;flex-shrink:0;background:#0D1825;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:zoom-in;" onclick="abrirLightbox()"><img src="${f}" alt="foto" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;padding:8px;pointer-events:none;" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.style.fontSize='80px';this.parentElement.style.cursor='default';this.parentElement.textContent='${emojiEscaped}'"></div>`;
    }).join('');

    dots.innerHTML = fotos.map((_, i) =>
      `<span onclick="goSlide(${i})" style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;background:${i===0?'var(--neon)':'rgba(255,255,255,0.4)'};display:block;"></span>`
    ).join('');

    prev.style.display = sliderTotal > 1 ? 'flex' : 'none';
    next.style.display = sliderTotal > 1 ? 'flex' : 'none';
    track.style.transform = 'translateX(0)';
  }

  function sliderNav(dir) {
    sliderIndex = (sliderIndex + dir + sliderTotal) % sliderTotal;
    goSlide(sliderIndex);
  }

  function goSlide(i) {
    sliderIndex = i;
    document.getElementById('modalImgTrack').style.transform = `translateX(-${i * 100}%)`;
    document.querySelectorAll('#sliderDots span').forEach((d, idx) => {
      d.style.background = idx === i ? 'var(--neon)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.4)';
    });
  }

  function openModal(team, teamShort, name, price, emoji, imgUrl, priceOld) {
    // Busca o produto completo no catálogo para pegar todas as fotos e tamanhos
    const prodCompleto = todosOsProdutos.find(p => p.time === team && p.nome === name);
    const categoria = prodCompleto ? (prodCompleto.categoria || 'camisas') : 'camisas';
    const tamanhos = prodCompleto ? (prodCompleto.tamanhos || ['P','M','G','GG','G1','G2','G3','G4']) : ['P','M','G','GG','G1','G2','G3','G4'];

    currentProduct = {
      team, teamShort, name,
      price: parseFloat(price),
      emoji,
      imgUrl: imgUrl || '',
      categoria,
      fotos: prodCompleto ? (prodCompleto.fotos || (imgUrl ? [imgUrl] : [])) : (imgUrl ? [imgUrl] : [])
    };
    currentQty = 1;
    document.getElementById('modalTitle').textContent = name.toUpperCase();
    document.getElementById('modalTeam').textContent = team;
    document.getElementById('modalName').textContent = name;
    document.getElementById('modalPrice').textContent = 'R$ ' + parseFloat(price).toFixed(2).replace('.',',');

    // Renderiza tamanhos dinamicamente
    const sizeContainer = document.querySelector('.size-options');
    const especiais = ['G2','G3','G4'];
    const tamanhoUnico = tamanhos.length === 1 && tamanhos[0] === 'Único';
    const sizeSection = sizeContainer.closest('.size-selector');

    if (tamanhoUnico) {
      // Esconde seletor — tamanho único não precisa de escolha
      sizeSection.style.display = 'none';
      // Auto-seleciona internamente
      sizeContainer.innerHTML = `<button class="size-opt selected" onclick="selectSize(this)">Único</button>`;
    } else {
      sizeSection.style.display = '';
      sizeContainer.innerHTML = tamanhos.map(t =>
        `<button class="size-opt" onclick="selectSize(this)">${t}</button>`
      ).join('');
    }
    // Mostra nota de tamanho especial só se a categoria tiver G2/G3/G4
    const temEspecial = tamanhos.some(t => especiais.includes(t));
    document.getElementById('sizeExtraNote').style.display = temEspecial ? 'block' : 'none';

  // Kit Infantil (conjuntos): mesma estrutura das camisas — personalizacao + tamanhos 16-28
    const temPers = categoria === 'camisas' || categoria === 'conjuntos';
    const persLabel = document.querySelector('.pers-label');
    if (persLabel) persLabel.textContent = categoria === 'conjuntos' ? '✏️ Quero personalizar o kit' : '✏️ Quero personalizar minha camisa';
    const persArea = persLabel ? persLabel.closest('div[style*="rgba(141,198,63"]') : null;
    if (persArea) persArea.style.display = temPers ? '' : 'none';

    // Slider de imagens
    buildSlider(currentProduct);
    document.getElementById('qtyNum').textContent = 1;
    // Null-safe reset dos campos de personalização
    const persCheckEl = document.getElementById('persCheck');
    const persFieldsEl = document.getElementById('persFields');
    const persNomeEl = document.getElementById('persNome');
    const persNumeroEl = document.getElementById('persNumero');
    if (persCheckEl) persCheckEl.checked = false;
    if (persFieldsEl) persFieldsEl.style.display = 'none';
    if (persNomeEl) persNomeEl.value = '';
    if (persNumeroEl) persNumeroEl.value = '';
    document.querySelectorAll('.size-opt').forEach(s => s.classList.remove('selected'));
    // Se tamanho único, já está selecionado internamente
    if (tamanhoUnico) {
      const unico = document.querySelector('.size-opt');
      if (unico) unico.classList.add('selected');
    }
    document.getElementById('modalOverlay').classList.add('open');
  }

  function togglePers() {
    const check = document.getElementById('persCheck');
    const fields = document.getElementById('persFields');
    if (!check || !fields) return;
    setTimeout(() => {
      fields.style.display = check.checked ? 'flex' : 'none';
      updateModalPrice();
    }, 10);
  }

  function closeModal(e) {
    if (e.target === document.getElementById('modalOverlay')) {
      document.getElementById('modalOverlay').classList.remove('open');
    }
  }

  function selectSize(btn) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.size-opt').forEach(s => s.classList.remove('selected'));
    btn.classList.add('selected');
    updateModalPrice();
  }

  function changeQty(delta) {
    currentQty = Math.max(1, currentQty + delta);
    document.getElementById('qtyNum').textContent = currentQty;
    updateModalPrice();
  }

  function updateModalPrice() {
    const base = currentProduct.price || 149.90;
    const persCheckEl = document.getElementById('persCheck');
    const pers = persCheckEl && persCheckEl.checked ? 40 : 0;
    const sizeEl = document.querySelector('.size-opt.selected');
    const sizeExtra = sizeEl && ['G2','G3','G4'].includes(sizeEl.textContent) ? 10 : 0;
    const total = (base + pers + sizeExtra) * currentQty;
    const priceEl = document.getElementById('modalPrice');
    if (priceEl) priceEl.textContent = 'R$ ' + total.toFixed(2).replace('.',',');
    const noteEl = document.getElementById('sizeExtraNote');
    if (noteEl) noteEl.style.display = sizeExtra > 0 ? 'block' : 'none';
  }

  function addToCartModal() {
    // Para tamanho Único (acessórios), auto-seleciona
    const uniqueBtn = document.querySelector('.size-opt.selected') || document.querySelector('.size-opt');
    const tamanhoUnicoMode = currentProduct.categoria === 'acessorios' &&
      document.querySelector('.size-selector') &&
      document.querySelector('.size-selector').style.display === 'none';

    if (!tamanhoUnicoMode) {
      const sizeSelected = document.querySelector('.size-opt.selected');
      if (!sizeSelected) { alert('Por favor, selecione um tamanho!'); return; }
    }

    const persCheckEl = document.getElementById('persCheck');
    const pers = persCheckEl ? persCheckEl.checked : false;
    if (pers) {
      const nome = document.getElementById('persNome') ? document.getElementById('persNome').value.trim() : '';
      const numero = document.getElementById('persNumero') ? document.getElementById('persNumero').value.trim() : '';
      if (!nome) { alert('Digite o nome para personalização!'); return; }
      if (!numero) { alert('Digite o número para personalização!'); return; }
    }
    const persNome = pers ? (document.getElementById('persNome') ? document.getElementById('persNome').value.trim().toUpperCase() : '') : '';
    const persNumero = pers ? (document.getElementById('persNumero') ? document.getElementById('persNumero').value.trim() : '') : '';
    const sizeEl = document.querySelector('.size-opt.selected');
    const sizeText = tamanhoUnicoMode ? 'Único' : (sizeEl ? sizeEl.textContent : 'Único');
    const sizeExtra = sizeEl && ['G2','G3','G4'].includes(sizeEl.textContent) ? 10 : 0;
    const price = currentProduct.price + (pers ? 40 : 0) + sizeExtra;
    addToCartItem({
      name: currentProduct.name,
      team: currentProduct.team,
      emoji: currentProduct.emoji,
      imgUrl: currentProduct.imgUrl || null,
      size: sizeText,
      personalization: pers,
      persNome, persNumero,
      price: price,
      qty: currentQty
    });
    document.getElementById('modalOverlay').classList.remove('open');
  }

  function addToCart(name) {
    addToCartItem({ name, team: '', emoji: '👕', size: 'M', price: 149.90, qty: 1 });
  }

  function addToCartItem(item) {
    cart.push(item);
    updateCartUI();
    // Flash cart button
    const btn = document.querySelector('.cart-btn');
    btn.style.borderColor = 'var(--verde)';
    setTimeout(() => btn.style.borderColor = '', 800);
  }

  function updateCartUI() {
    const count = cart.reduce((a, b) => a + b.qty, 0);
    document.getElementById('cartCount').textContent = count;

    const total = cart.reduce((a, b) => a + b.price * b.qty, 0);
    document.getElementById('cartTotal').textContent = 'R$ ' + total.toFixed(2).replace('.',',');

    const container = document.getElementById('cartItems');
    if (cart.length === 0) {
      container.innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:center; color:rgba(245,247,250,0.4); padding:40px 0"><div style="font-size:48px; margin-bottom:12px">🛒</div><div>Seu carrinho está vazio</div></div>';
      return;
    }

    container.innerHTML = cart.map((item, i) => `
      <div class="cart-item">
        <div class="cart-item-img">${item.emoji}</div>
        <div class="cart-item-info">
          <div class="cart-item-name">${item.name}</div>
          <div class="cart-item-detail">${item.team ? item.team + ' · ' : ''}Tam: ${item.size} · Qtd: ${item.qty}${item.personalization ? ' · Personalizado' : ''}</div>
          <div class="cart-item-price">R$ ${(item.price * item.qty).toFixed(2).replace('.',',')}</div>
        </div>
        <button onclick="removeItem(${i})" style="background:none; border:none; color:rgba(245,247,250,0.3); cursor:pointer; font-size:16px; align-self:flex-start">✕</button>
      </div>
    `).join('');
  }

  function removeItem(i) {
    cart.splice(i, 1);
    updateCartUI();
  }

  function toggleCart() {
    document.getElementById('cartSidebar').classList.toggle('open');
  }

  // CEP formatting
  function formatCEP(input) {
    let val = input.value.replace(/\D/g, '');
    if (val.length > 5) val = val.slice(0,5) + '-' + val.slice(5,8);
    input.value = val;
  }

  // Frete calculation (simulated)
  // =========================================================
  // CÁLCULO DE FRETE — MELHOR ENVIO (via API Vercel)
  // Quando publicado no Vercel, chama /api/frete em tempo real
  // Em modo local/preview, usa tabela simulada como fallback
  // =========================================================

  async function calcularFrete() {
    const cepRaw = document.getElementById('cepInput').value.replace(/\D/g,'');
    if (cepRaw.length < 8) { alert('Digite um CEP válido com 8 dígitos!'); return; }

    const btn = document.querySelector('[onclick="calcularFrete()"]');
    const btnText = btn.textContent;
    btn.textContent = '⏳ Calculando...';
    btn.disabled = true;

    // Quantidade no carrinho (mínimo 1)
    const qtd = Math.max(1, cart.reduce((a,b) => a + b.qty, 0));

    try {
      // Tenta chamar a API do Melhor Envio via Vercel
      const resp = await fetch('/api/frete', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ cep_destino: cepRaw, quantidade: qtd })
      });

      if (resp.ok) {
        const data = await resp.json();
        if (data.sucesso && data.opcoes.length > 0) {
          renderFreteAPI(data.opcoes, cepRaw);
          btn.textContent = btnText;
          btn.disabled = false;
          return;
        }
      }
    } catch(e) {
      // API indisponível (ex: rodando local) — usa fallback
      console.log('API frete indisponível, usando tabela local:', e.message);
    }

    // FALLBACK — tabela simulada Correios (usada em preview/local)
    fallbackFrete(cepRaw);
    btn.textContent = btnText;
    btn.disabled = false;
  }

  function renderFreteAPI(opcoes, cep) {
    // Reconstrói o bloco de resultado com as opções reais do Melhor Envio
    const resultado = document.getElementById('freteResult');
    resultado.innerHTML = '<div style="font-size:13px; color:var(--verde); font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1px; margin-bottom:12px">OPÇÕES DE ENTREGA — TEMPO REAL</div>';

    opcoes.forEach(op => {
      const div = document.createElement('div');
      div.className = 'frete-option';
      div.innerHTML = `
        <div>
          <div class="frete-name">${op.empresa} — ${op.nome}</div>
          <div class="frete-prazo">Prazo: ${op.prazo} dias úteis</div>
        </div>
        <div class="frete-valor">R$ ${op.preco.replace('.',',')}</div>
      `;
      resultado.appendChild(div);
    });

    // Opção retirada sempre ao final
    const retirada = document.createElement('div');
